items.title: Resilient API calls
items.description: Catch rate-limit, timeout and transient server errors around model API calls, then back off and retry; surface a clear error only after retries are exhausted.

items.title: Safe parsing of model output
items.description: LLMs sometimes return malformed JSON. Wrap json.loads in a handler and either repair, re-prompt for valid JSON, or fall back to a default structure.

items.title: Tool/function-call failures in agents
items.description: Wrap tool execution errors in a custom exception so the agent loop can catch it, tell the model the tool failed, and try an alternative.

items.title: Input validation with guard raises
items.description: Raise ValueError early for empty prompts, out-of-range temperatures or oversized inputs so bad requests fail fast with a clear message.

items.title: Guaranteed cleanup
items.description: Use finally (or a context manager) to release resources — close file handles, flush logs, return pooled connections — even when an error occurs mid-operation.
